title: Rich Air Fried Peruvian Chicken Skewers
description: A keto-friendly Peruvian dish featuring gelatine leaves and air-fried chicken, perfect for adventurous eaters looking for a light and fatty meal.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, garlic, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Remove the gelatine leaves from the water and wrap each skewer with a leaf, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Place the skewers in the air fryer basket, leaving some space between each skewer.
Cook the skewers in the air fryer for 12 minutes, shaking the basket halfway through.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
